meta.title: Football Fantasy — Live your league and challenge your friends
meta.description: Follow Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and Bundesliga live. Build your fantasy team with a live draft, play exact-score pools and survive in Survivor. Free.

hero.subtitle: Follow five top leagues live, build your fantasy team with a real-time draft, predict scores in pools and survive matchday after matchday in Survivor. All in one place, completely free.
hero.note: No cost · No card · Install it on your phone

leagues.label: Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and Bundesliga

modes.label: Fantasy, pools and Survivor with your friends

features.title: Everything you need to live football
features.subtitle: Five leagues, three game modes and your group of friends, in a single app.

live.title: Five leagues live
live.body: Standings, results, fixtures and stats for Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A and Bundesliga.

fantasy.title: Fantasy with a live draft
fantasy.body: Draft your players in turns and face your friends every matchday in head-to-head duels.

pools.title: Exact-score pools
pools.body: Predict the score of every match and earn points for exact score, correct winner or correct draw.

survivor.title: Survivor with lives
survivor.body: One pick per matchday, no repeating teams. If your team loses, you lose a life; the last one standing wins.

versus.title: Compare and analyze
versus.body: Put two players head to head and find out who performs better before setting your lineup.

pwa.title: Install it as an app
pwa.body: Works on your phone like a native app, with notifications for your draft and your leagues.

how.title: Start in 3 steps
how.subtitle: You'll be competing in less than a minute.

one.title: Create your account
one.body: Sign up for free with your email or Google in seconds.

two.title: Pick your league
two.body: Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Serie A or Bundesliga: you decide which football to follow.

three.title: Pick your game mode
three.body: Create a fantasy league, a pool or a Survivor and invite your friends with a code.

cta.title: Ready to play?
cta.subtitle: Join for free and prove you know more football than your friends.

footer.tagline: Live your league. Challenge your friends.
